twitch_info.title: playing gluten free fangames (running out of ideas)

message.body: gab have you hopped on new watson game
the backlog won't stand a chance
real shit if you became immortal how long would it take to beat happil 2
but like, how long into your immortality would it take for you to caer
would you get to it before the sun expanded and consumed the earth
even if you can't die, your pc can
so what the leehe is this
damn it like nailed the style
between the inverted fruit, the dumb pacing, the background that's just a google image fanart search, the blocks doing some bullshit, and the timer in the top right:
you could tell me leehe made this and i'd believe you
oh and the random ass pre boss
is there a reason youre not taking the save
i thought maybe it was just a trap i forgot about lol
water can create variance in timing of hitting the spike of 4 frames
could have saved it with the ledge :^)
happy new years 2026 i am assuming!!!
whoa amelia raided you instead of pdplayer? huge honor
i really wanted to raid pdplayer
pdplayer's chatted in my stream before, he is not englishphobic
it would be too tragic i guess.... when you make break the series gab i will raid you ever single time
any medley as long as it is good amelia310Look
wait gaborro how has minecraft been going? were you able to build the best house ever?
wait i will let you focus on this
oh btw did you ever update New Year from when you first downloaded it?
i am really excited as well 🙏 i am hoping it isn't too tough
he is in the process of updating for other stuff, so we'll see when he gets to that
did you stop getting older as of recent
i’m late to the stream cause i was eating hotpot at a friends house
u don’t see fangame autoscrollers that often
bro didn’t make the bg move
this is lowkey a hard ass 100f
sure it could be worse, but it's so clever
this guy would be unstoppable if he made his own tilesets
Egg_Zauce watched 10 consecutive streams and sparked a watch streak! k
Barfyace watched 10 consecutive streams and sparked a watch streak! Maybe a golden shower in the clear screen
golden room references how if you go for the golden strawberry (a.k.a. deathless) in chapter 9 of celeste it adds a completely original choke room
for the love of the game? nah, for the HATE of the game
Not too late for him to start barfyaSmilingFriend
i did it deathless for fun. it took an extremely long time
dying takes you back to the last cat
didn't choke the single block jumps
Gotta double check the found secrets
imagine if the border color changes once you get the secret
i talked through literally everything that was suspicious when he was in my chat
and most of them were mistakes
he just didn't want you to be the first 100% clear
he did put a bunch of easter eggs in, but there are only 2 secrets
The secrets are in hard mode 🤯
when you start going through the screens youll see it lol
u may have to bubble down
it isnt a mistake. he made all the numbers shootable on 55-57 just for fun, so the water was added to make it so you can shoot that one
maybe you have to go up the water fast
look how they shine for you
it was the literal first screen you looked at that you said "oh is it here"
yes, the one that looks obvious is indeed the one
yes and you immediately thought itd be this screen lol
you dont perhaps see anything else on the screen that looks suspicious
oh yeah... it's all coming together
the solution isnt obvious by any means
Next collab will have that for sure
he said the reason he only put 2 secrets in 2026 was because he thought it would be a waste of time that no one would care enough about
but seeing the excitement about secrets in 2026 made him realize it is worth it and now he's pumped to do a ton more in 2027
had to take matters into our own hands...
yeah i have faith 2027 will be better than 2025 for secrets
i kinda had clip material lol
cant easily show it because that section was hard muted on twitch'
in the pop-off section, gab and wolsk find a secret
oh you mean the "repeat" part lol
i unironically thought that was real LMFAO
bro that fall made me shit myself too
and i did that screen twice so both times it got me
twitch nuked the clip for it
would have to go into the vod
0 views in 3 seconds kinda fell off........
my top prios at the moment are K2W and soon Heart Beats
could play the new OMGUY thing
we rolled SB Game pt. 1 in roulette
im going as far as i feel like i can go. bottomless abyss looks above my skill, but i think i can get there with not too much difficulty
https://delicious-fruit.com/ratings/game_details.php?id=46103 this looks like it got missed
Humble Bundle will release and bring peace to the fangame land
I played Laser Game, it's an OK/decent modern chinese style trap game
Ur right I need to review more I'm sorry I'm failing today's makers
Fffffu I don't remember how hard it is I need to look at my own vod
i think 2026 has much more smooth needle, but i wish it was wackier
so it is a bit better
the 32 square games are pretty solid
theyre why ive been a fan of his for years
i was playing NEEDLE IS NOT A TREATMENT PLAN
I'll just force you it's fine
It's not like the craziest thing ever, that other game is like way better than My Floor Game could ever dream of being
Like I heard it was partially inspired by my game, but I didn't believe it
and seeing the first "real" stage completely confirmed it, like
https://i.ibb.co/jknCV1dt/inspiro.png Like you can see the direct inspritation. Top is my game, bottom is their game
still cant beleive yall played mauri for as long as yall did
but honestly, playing NEEDLE IS NOT A TREAMENT PLAN has kinda changed my mind on how I was gonna drop my magnum opus. I might just publicly release it
btw that's gonna be the name of the game, just "My magnum opus" because it is what it is

well, my viewpoint on it may be extremely and obviously flawed, but I the reason I was only going to give it to a few people is because the game is super personal, and I put a lot of work into it and I felt like only letting people who I knew would completely appreciate it have it. I didn't want little timmy to download my game because it's obviously not made for people like that
No it's not that would have cared about what happil jr. has to say about my game, I just wouldn't want them to experience it LMAO
I don't know how to go about explaining it, but there's a reason for why I wanted to do what I wanted to do, and it's not just some random egotistical bs
so who is this deviantart girl
If he didn't photoshop his OC next to her in movie scenes then he's not a real fan
my opinion of Harry potter is that gandalf dies
you gotta fucking watch teamsao adventures

I saw the first movie when I was a little kid and only remember the scene where the tree attacks the car and thought that was cool. I saw the final movie on a high school trip and I kinda just didn't really care
I read the first book when i was young and thought it was shit
because I kinda wanna play more of that game
